ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the experiment belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the image belongs to */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of microscopy technique used (e.g., fluorescence, phase contrast) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the image was acquired */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Binary data representing the image */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well from which the image was taken */,
  "magnification" INTEGER /* Magnification level used for the image */,
  "exposure_time" REAL /* Exposure time in seconds */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective lens used */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "annotation_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the feature was extracted from */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., cell area, gene expression level) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  "feature_method" TEXT /* Method used to extract the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent cell */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation number of the cell */,
  "lineage_description" TEXT /* Description of the lineage */,
  "lineage_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the lineage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_lineage_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plates" (
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plate */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the plate belongs to */,
  "plate_name" TEXT /* Name of the plate */,
  "plate_type" TEXT /* Type of plate (e.g., 96-well, 384-well) */,
  "plate_material" TEXT /* Material of the plate */,
  "plate_surface" TEXT /* Surface treatment of the plate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plates_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "plate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plate the well belongs to */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row number of the well */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column number of the well */,
  "well_volume" REAL /* Volume of the well in microliters */,
  "well_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_plate_id FOREIGN KEY ("plate_id") REFERENCES plates ("plate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images_wells" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the image belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id", "well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orf" (
  "orf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ORF */,
  "orf_name" TEXT /* Name of the ORF */,
  "orf_description" TEXT /* Description of the ORF */,
  "orf_sequence" TEXT /* Nucleotide sequence of the ORF */,
  "orf_function" TEXT /* Biological function of the ORF */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_id_orf" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell */,
  "orf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ORF the cell is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id", "orf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "strain_description" TEXT /* Description of the strain */,
  "strain_genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the strain */,
  "strain_phenotype" TEXT /* Phenotype of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)
